hidden_state.goal: Plan a migration from JWT tokens to session-based auth
hidden_state.hidden_truth: Three microservices still use the JWT library directly and bypassing them during migration would leave a security gap the audit won't accept

opening_input: We need to migrate from JWT to session auth. Security audit flagged our current approach.
behavioral_rules: Will challenge any plan that doesn't address rollback for auth changes. Expects the plan to flag protected paths. Wants to see a challenge artifact referenced. Will push back if the tier classification seems too low for auth work.
